title: podocarpus lenticularis
intro: Podocarpus lenticularis, also known as the Yellow Podocarpus, is a species of coniferous tree native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
